options.name: -congAware
options.description: resizes and shifts the floorplan objects by estimating the congestion for the floorplan and automatically deciding where to draw a resize line to avoid the congested area.

options.name: -honorHalo
options.description: honors placement halo and preserves the space between macros held by halo after the floorplan resize.

options.name: -ioMoveWithEdge
options.description: moves pins on the moved edge orthogonally to edge direction so pins stay on edge after movement.

options.name: -ioProportional
options.description: resize the space among I/Os proportionally.

options.name: -maintainResourceRatioAfterResize
options.description: Enable to maintain the resource ratio after resizeFloorplan in shift-based mode.

options.name: -proportional
options.description: resizes the space among floorplan objects proportionally.

options.name: -shiftBased
options.description: shifts floorplan objects at appropriate location(s) without changing the proportional spacing.

options.name: -shrinkFence
options.description: enables resized lines to go through fences and regions in floorplan.

options.name: -snapToTrack
options.description: snaps resize values (shrink/expand) of the floorplan to a multiple integer of the metal layer pitch.

options.name: -quiet
options.description: Displays the current settings in Tcl list format only

options.name: -nonDefault
options.description: Displays the current settings which are not default settings
